description: Configure the Jitsi Meet instance in /home/ga/jitsi/ so that the in-meeting toolbar remains permanently visible by disabling the auto-hide feature in the interface configuration override file (/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js). Verify the fix by joining the 'SilverConnectTest' meeting room and confirming the toolbar remains visible after 10 seconds of inactivity. Save a screenshot of the meeting with the visible toolbar to /home/ga/Documents/persistent_toolbar.png.
